pi_items.source: Verified across setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and task.json description
Web search confirms BBC operates bbc.com; verified as real public website
Web search confirms The New York Times operates nytimes.com; verified as real public website
Web search confirms GitHub operates github.com; verified as real public website
Web search confirms Wikimedia Foundation operates wikipedia.org; verified as real public website
Web search confirms National Weather Service operates weather.gov; verified as real public website
Web search confirms edge://version is a real Microsoft Edge internal page for viewing browser version information
Web search confirms edge://process-internals is a real Microsoft Edge internal page showing process details and site isolation information
Web search confirms Microsoft Edge has a 'Save resources with sleeping tabs' feature enabled in Settings > System and performance
Web search confirms Microsoft Edge has a 'Startup boost' feature enabled in Settings > System and performance

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic browser performance diagnostic task requiring interaction with five real public websites: BBC (bbc.com), The New York Times (nytimes.com), GitHub (github.com), Wikipedia (wikipedia.org), and the National Weather Service (weather.gov). The agent must access two real Microsoft Edge internal pages (edge://version and edge://process-internals) to gather diagnostic information, enable two real browser settings ('Save resources with sleeping tabs' and 'Startup boost' in Settings > System and performance), and create a performance report at /home/ga/Desktop/performance_report.txt.
